catalogue.name: Amber & Sandalwood Pillar Candle
catalogue.description: A warm, grounding pillar candle blending amber resin and sandalwood. Burns evenly for up to 60 hours.
catalogue.care: Trim wick to 5mm before each burn. Keep away from drafts.

catalogue.name: Sea Salt & Driftwood Jar Candle
catalogue.description: Fresh coastal notes of sea salt and sun-bleached driftwood in a reusable glass jar. 50-hour burn time.
catalogue.materials: Coconut-soy blend wax, wood wick, glass jar
catalogue.care: Allow wax to pool fully on first burn to prevent tunnelling.

catalogue.name: Black Fig & Cassis Taper Candles (Set of 4)
catalogue.description: Elegant unscented tapers in deep jewel tones, perfect for dinner table settings.
catalogue.care: Place in a secure candle holder. Never leave unattended.

catalogue.name: Lavender & Chamomile Sleep Candle
catalogue.description: Calming lavender and chamomile blend formulated to promote relaxation. Ideal for bedrooms. 45-hour burn.
catalogue.care: Extinguish 30 minutes before sleep.

catalogue.name: Cedarwood & Smoke Ritual Candle
catalogue.description: Deep, smoky cedarwood with hints of leather and black pepper. Hand-poured in small batches. 55-hour burn.
catalogue.care: Burn on a heat-resistant surface. Keep wick centred.

catalogue.name: Lemon Verbena & Basil Candle
catalogue.description: Bright, herbaceous kitchen candle that neutralises cooking odours. 40-hour burn time.
catalogue.care: Ideal for kitchens. Keep away from food surfaces when lit.

catalogue.name: Oud & Rose Luxury Candle
catalogue.description: A sophisticated blend of Middle Eastern oud and Turkish rose petals. Presented in a gift-ready matte black vessel. 70-hour burn.
catalogue.materials: Premium soy-paraffin blend, cotton wick, ceramic vessel
catalogue.care: Ceramic vessel can be repurposed as a pot or storage cup after use.

catalogue.name: Vanilla Bean & Tonka Candle
catalogue.description: Sweet, cosy vanilla bean enriched with warm tonka bean. A best-seller for autumn and winter. 50-hour burn.
catalogue.care: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

catalogue.name: Eucalyptus & Mint Candle
catalogue.description: Invigorating eucalyptus and peppermint. Popular for home offices and bathrooms. 40-hour burn.
catalogue.care: Do not burn for more than 4 hours at a time.

catalogue.name: Petrichor & Green Tea Candle
catalogue.description: Captures the scent of rain on dry earth with a clean green tea finish. A unique, conversation-starting fragrance. 55-hour burn.
catalogue.care: Allow to cool completely before moving.

catalogue.name: Chunky Knit Throw — Oatmeal
catalogue.description: Oversized hand-knitted throw in a thick oatmeal yarn. Adds instant texture to sofas and armchairs.
catalogue.care: Dry clean only. Store folded in a breathable bag.

catalogue.name: Velvet Cushion Cover — Midnight Blue
catalogue.description: Plush velvet cushion cover with a hidden zip. Reversible with a complementary linen back.
catalogue.care: Spot clean only. Do not tumble dry.

catalogue.name: Linen Cushion — Striped Natural
catalogue.description: Casual woven linen cushion with vintage-style ticking stripes. Removable cover with button fastening.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 30°C. Line dry.

catalogue.name: Faux Fur Cushion — Arctic White
catalogue.description: Ultra-soft faux fur cushion with inner pad included. A luxurious accent for bedrooms and living rooms.
catalogue.materials: Faux fur cover, hollow fibre inner
catalogue.care: Surface clean with damp cloth. Do not machine wash.

catalogue.name: Recycled Cotton Throw — Dusty Rose
catalogue.description: Lightweight throw woven from recycled cotton yarn. Carries a Global Recycled Standard certification.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Tumble dry low.

catalogue.name: Embroidered Floral Cushion
catalogue.description: Hand-embroidered botanical motif on a cotton canvas base. Each piece is slightly unique.
catalogue.care: Dry clean recommended. Spot clean minor marks.

catalogue.name: Sherpa Fleece Throw — Caramel
catalogue.description: Double-sided sherpa fleece throw — soft pile on one side, smooth fleece on the reverse. Extra-large for wrapping up.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 30°C. Do not iron.

catalogue.name: Moroccan Pom-Pom Throw
catalogue.description: Handwoven in Morocco with authentic pom-pom fringe detailing. A statement piece for any living space.
catalogue.care: Hand wash cold. Lay flat to dry.

catalogue.name: Linen Floor Cushion — Sage
catalogue.description: Large floor cushion perfect for casual seating, meditation, or children's rooms. Removable linen cover.
catalogue.materials: Stonewashed linen cover, buckwheat hull fill
catalogue.care: Remove cover and machine wash 30°C.

catalogue.name: Ombre Gradient Cushion — Sunset
catalogue.description: Gradient-dyed cushion moving from deep coral to pale peach. A contemporary pop of colour for neutral spaces.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 30°C. Cool iron if needed.

catalogue.name: Rattan Table Lamp — Natural
catalogue.description: Hand-woven rattan shade on a solid mango wood base. Creates warm dappled light patterns. E27 bulb compatible.
catalogue.care: Dust regularly with a soft brush. Avoid moisture.

catalogue.name: Marble & Brass Floor Lamp
catalogue.description: Statement floor lamp with a white marble base and brushed brass stem. Fabric drum shade included. E27 bulb.
catalogue.materials: Marble base, brass-finish steel stem, linen shade
catalogue.care: Wipe marble with a damp cloth. Polish brass with specialist cleaner.

catalogue.name: Concrete Pendant Light
catalogue.description: Minimalist cast concrete pendant in a tapered form. 1.5m fabric cable. Ideal for kitchen islands and dining tables.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a dry cloth only.

catalogue.name: Bamboo Arc Floor Lamp
catalogue.description: Elegant arching bamboo floor lamp that extends over sofas and reading chairs. Rice paper shade diffuses light softly.
catalogue.care: Do not expose to direct sunlight for extended periods. Avoid humidity.

catalogue.name: Ceramic Bedside Lamp — Terracotta
catalogue.description: Thrown on a wheel by hand, each lamp is slightly unique. Warm terracotta glaze with a linen drum shade.
catalogue.care: Handle base with care — ceramic is fragile. Dust shade gently.

catalogue.name: Industrial Cage Wall Sconce
catalogue.description: Vintage-inspired cage wall light in aged black metal. Requires hardwiring. E14 bulb compatible.
catalogue.care: Wipe with dry cloth. Professional installation recommended.

catalogue.name: Washi Paper Table Lamp
catalogue.description: Japanese-inspired table lamp with a handmade washi paper shade. Emits a calm, diffused glow. E27 compatible.
catalogue.care: Keep away from moisture and direct heat sources.

catalogue.name: LED Edison Bulb String Lights
catalogue.description: 10m string of warm-white LED Edison bulbs. Plug-in with transformer included. Indoor/outdoor rated.
catalogue.care: Do not exceed 10 connections in series. Store coiled to avoid kinks.

catalogue.name: Sculptural Plaster Table Lamp
catalogue.description: Architecturally inspired plaster lamp with an irregular organic form. A functional sculpture for living rooms. E27.
catalogue.care: Handle carefully — do not drop. Clean with dry brush only.

catalogue.name: Plug-in Canopy Pendant Light
catalogue.description: Simple plug-in pendant with a ceiling canopy plate and 2m braided cable. No hardwiring needed. E27.
catalogue.care: Ensure plug socket is accessible. Do not exceed 60W bulb.

catalogue.name: Reed Diffuser — Bergamot & Neroli
catalogue.description: Light, uplifting citrus diffuser with bergamot and neroli. 200ml oil with 8 reeds. Lasts approximately 3 months.
catalogue.materials: Fragrance oil, rattan reeds, glass bottle
catalogue.care: Flip reeds weekly for stronger throw. Keep away from direct sunlight.

catalogue.name: Room Spray — Linen & White Tea
catalogue.description: Instant freshness with a clean linen and white tea blend. 100ml pump spray. Safe on most fabrics.
catalogue.care: Test on a small hidden area before spraying on fabrics. Do not spray on polished surfaces.

catalogue.name: Ceramic Aroma Diffuser — Pebble
catalogue.description: Ultrasonic ceramic diffuser in a smooth pebble form. 300ml tank, 8-hour continuous mode, auto-shutoff. Includes 10ml starter oil.
catalogue.care: Clean weekly with a cotton swab and white vinegar solution.

catalogue.name: Wax Melts — Orchard Collection (Set of 6)
catalogue.description: Six hand-poured soy wax melts in apple, pear, and quince scents. Compatible with all standard wax warmers.
catalogue.care: Never leave wax warmer unattended. Replace melt when scent fades.

catalogue.name: Incense Stick Set — Sacred Spaces
catalogue.description: Set of 40 hand-rolled incense sticks across four scents: frankincense, palo santo, sandalwood, white sage. Wooden holder included.
catalogue.care: Burn in a well-ventilated area. Place holder on a heat-resistant surface.

catalogue.name: Car Diffuser — Vetiver & Cedarwood
catalogue.description: Compact vent-clip diffuser with a long-lasting vetiver and cedarwood oil pad. Lasts 30 days per pad. Refills available.
catalogue.care: Replace pad monthly. Keep oil away from car interior surfaces.

catalogue.name: Linen Water Spray — Lavender
catalogue.description: Ironing and linen spray with pure lavender essential oil. Refreshes bed linen, towels, and clothing. 250ml.
catalogue.care: Shake before use. Store in a cool place. Do not use on silk or delicate fabrics.

catalogue.name: Potpourri Jar — Festive Spice
catalogue.description: Decorative potpourri blend of dried orange peel, cinnamon sticks, cloves, and star anise. Long-lasting natural fragrance.
catalogue.materials: Dried botanicals, fragrance refresh oil included
catalogue.care: Add a few drops of the included refresh oil to revive scent. Keep dry.

catalogue.name: Soy Wax Tart Burner Set
catalogue.description: Glazed ceramic wax burner with six assorted soy wax tarts. Safe tea-light heated design. A great gift set.
catalogue.care: Use only unscented tea lights. Replace tart when liquid wax no longer emits scent.

catalogue.name: Essential Oil Blend — Rest & Restore
catalogue.description: Pure essential oil blend of lavender, frankincense, and Roman chamomile. For use in diffusers, baths, or diluted for massage. 30ml.
catalogue.care: Do not apply undiluted to skin. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool dark place.

catalogue.name: Seagrass Basket — Large
catalogue.description: Hand-woven seagrass storage basket with leather handles. Ideal for blankets, laundry, or toys. Naturally sustainable.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a dry cloth. Avoid prolonged moisture exposure.

catalogue.name: Linen Drawer Liners (Set of 5)
catalogue.description: Scented linen drawer liners with a subtle lavender fragrance. Cut-to-size. Pack of 5 sheets.
catalogue.care: Replace every 6 months or when scent fades. Do not use in damp drawers.

catalogue.name: Stackable Linen Storage Boxes (Set of 3)
catalogue.description: Set of three stackable fabric storage boxes with removable lids. Label windows on the front. Foldable when empty.
catalogue.care: Spot clean only. Do not overfill — maintain box shape.

catalogue.name: Bamboo Desk Organiser
catalogue.description: Six-compartment bamboo desk organiser for stationery, phones, and small accessories. Smooth sanded finish.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a slightly damp cloth. Apply bamboo oil annually to maintain finish.

catalogue.name: Hanging Wardrobe Organiser — 6 Pockets
catalogue.description: Canvas hanging organiser with 6 deep pockets. Hooks over wardrobe rail. Ideal for shoes, accessories, or folded clothes.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 30°C. Reshape while damp.

catalogue.name: Rattan Storage Tray — Oval
catalogue.description: Open-weave rattan tray for coffee tables, ottomans, and shelving. Corrals remote controls, books, and accessories.
catalogue.care: Dust regularly. Avoid direct sunlight to prevent bleaching.

catalogue.name: Under-Bed Storage Bag (Set of 2)
catalogue.description: Breathable cotton under-bed bags with a clear window and zip closure. Ideal for seasonal clothing and bedding.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Air dry fully before storing items.

catalogue.name: Ceramic Trinket Dish Set
catalogue.description: Set of three nesting ceramic dishes for jewellery, keys, and small items. Hand-painted with a speckled glaze.
catalogue.dimensions: Small Ø 8cm, Medium Ø 12cm, Large Ø 16cm
catalogue.care: Hand wash recommended. Not suitable for microwave or dishwasher.

catalogue.name: Jute Magazine Basket
catalogue.description: Tall, slim jute basket designed for magazines, newspapers, books, or umbrellas. Sturdy enough to hold its shape.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a dry cloth. Do not expose to rain or moisture.

catalogue.name: Pegboard Wall Organiser Kit
catalogue.description: Wooden pegboard with 12 assorted hooks and shelves. Mounts to any wall. Customisable layout for kitchen, office, or hallway.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a damp cloth. Redistribute weight evenly across hooks.

catalogue.name: Stonewashed Linen Duvet Cover — King
catalogue.description: Pre-washed linen duvet cover with a relaxed, lived-in texture. Button fastening. Gets softer with every wash.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Tumble dry low. Iron while slightly damp for a crisp look or leave for a casual texture.

catalogue.name: Egyptian Cotton Pillowcase Set — Standard
catalogue.description: Set of two 400-thread-count Egyptian cotton pillowcases with an envelope closure. Noticeably soft from the first wash.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 60°C. Tumble dry medium. Iron on cotton setting.

catalogue.name: Weighted Blanket — 7kg
catalogue.description: Glass-bead weighted blanket designed to ease anxiety and improve sleep quality. Removable microfibre cover.
catalogue.care: Machine wash cover 30°C. Spot clean blanket only. Lay flat to dry.

catalogue.name: Organic Cotton Flat Sheet — Double
catalogue.description: GOTS-certified organic cotton flat sheet. Percale weave for a cool, crisp feel. Generous tuck-in allowance.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 60°C. Tumble dry medium. Iron on high for crispness.

catalogue.name: Merino Wool Blanket — Herringbone
catalogue.description: Classic herringbone merino wool blanket. Lightweight yet warm — perfect as a bed layer or sofa throw.
catalogue.care: Dry clean or hand wash cold. Lay flat to dry. Fold for storage.

catalogue.name: Jersey Fitted Sheet — Queen
catalogue.description: T-shirt soft jersey fitted sheet with 35cm deep elasticated pocket. Stays put all night. Machine washable.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Tumble dry low. Do not iron.

catalogue.name: Bamboo Duvet — All Seasons (King)
catalogue.description: Temperature-regulating bamboo-fill duvet with a 400TC cotton cover. All-season 10.5 tog rating. Hypoallergenic.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C on gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Re-plump after washing.

catalogue.name: Waffle Weave Throw Blanket
catalogue.description: Textured waffle weave cotton blanket. Absorbs moisture and dries quickly — doubles as a light summer duvet.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Tumble dry medium. Softer with each wash.

catalogue.name: Linen Fitted Sheet — Single
catalogue.description: Stonewashed linen fitted sheet with a 30cm pocket depth. Regulates temperature naturally in summer and winter.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Line dry preferred. Softer with every wash.

catalogue.name: Silk Pillowcase — Standard (Set of 2)
catalogue.description: 22 momme mulberry silk pillowcases with a hidden zip. Reduces hair friction and helps maintain skin moisture overnight.
catalogue.care: Hand wash cold with silk detergent. Do not tumble dry or wring. Iron on low with a cloth barrier.

catalogue.name: Stoneware Dinner Set — 12 Piece
catalogue.description: Artisan-style stoneware set for four: 4 dinner plates, 4 side plates, 4 bowls. Each piece is hand-dipped in a reactive glaze for a unique finish.
catalogue.dimensions: Dinner plate Ø 27cm, side plate Ø 20cm, bowl Ø 16cm
catalogue.care: Dishwasher safe. Not suitable for microwave. Handle with care — stoneware can chip.

catalogue.name: Linen Napkins (Set of 4)
catalogue.description: Generously sized pre-washed linen napkins. Hemstitched edges. Get softer and more absorbent with every wash.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Tumble dry low. Iron while slightly damp for a crisp look.

catalogue.name: Acacia Wood Cheese Board
catalogue.description: Large acacia wood serving board with a juice groove and built-in ceramic dip bowls. For cheese, charcuterie, and sharing platters.
catalogue.care: Hand wash only. Dry immediately. Oil with food-grade mineral oil monthly.

catalogue.name: Recycled Glass Tumblers (Set of 6)
catalogue.description: Handblown recycled glass tumblers with a subtle green tint from the recycled material. No two are identical.
catalogue.care: Dishwasher safe on low temperature. Handle with care — handblown glass is delicate.

catalogue.name: Cast Iron Trivet — Round
catalogue.description: Round cast iron trivet for protecting dining tables from hot pots and pans. A functional kitchen-to-table piece.
catalogue.care: Dry immediately after washing to prevent rust. Wipe with a light coat of oil before storage.

catalogue.name: Beeswax Food Wraps (Set of 3)
catalogue.description: Reusable beeswax wraps in three sizes as a sustainable alternative to cling film. Made with organic cotton and sustainably sourced beeswax.
catalogue.materials: Organic cotton, beeswax, tree resin, jojoba oil
catalogue.care: Wash with cool water and mild soap. Never use hot water or microwave. Air dry.

catalogue.name: Rattan Placemats (Set of 4)
catalogue.description: Flat-woven natural rattan placemats. Heat resistant up to 150°C. Add natural texture to any dining table.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a damp cloth. Do not submerge in water. Air dry.

catalogue.name: Handthrown Mug — Set of 2
catalogue.description: Pair of wheel-thrown stoneware mugs with a comfortable looped handle. Each has a unique glaze variation. 350ml capacity.
catalogue.care: Dishwasher safe. Microwave safe. Glaze may develop a natural patina over time.

catalogue.name: Linen Table Runner — Stripe
catalogue.description: Stonewashed linen table runner with subtle woven stripes. Adds texture without overpowering a table setting.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Line dry. Iron while damp.

catalogue.name: Marble Canister Set — 3 Piece
catalogue.description: Set of three marble-effect ceramic canisters with bamboo lids. For tea, coffee, and sugar. Creates an elegant kitchen countertop display.
catalogue.materials: Ceramic with marble glaze, bamboo lids
catalogue.dimensions: Small H 12cm, Medium H 15cm, Large H 18cm
catalogue.care: Hand wash lids. Ceramic canisters are dishwasher safe on top rack.

catalogue.name: Abstract Ink Print — Framed
catalogue.description: Giclée print of an original abstract ink painting. Professionally framed in a thin oak frame with non-reflective glass.
catalogue.materials: Giclée print, oak frame, non-reflective glass
catalogue.care: Dust frame with a soft cloth. Avoid hanging in direct sunlight.

catalogue.name: Macramé Wall Hanging — Large
catalogue.description: Large handmade macramé wall hanging in natural cotton rope. Adds a boho-organic texture to living rooms and bedrooms.
catalogue.care: Shake gently to remove dust. Spot clean with a damp cloth. Do not machine wash.

catalogue.name: Botanical Illustration Set (3 Prints)
catalogue.description: Set of three unframed botanical illustrations — fern, monstera, and olive branch. Printed on archival matte paper.
catalogue.care: Frame before hanging. Store flat and away from moisture if unframed.

catalogue.name: Woven Wall Tapestry — Sunset Landscape
catalogue.description: Hand-woven wool tapestry depicting an abstract sunset landscape. A one-of-a-kind textile artwork.
catalogue.materials: Wool and cotton blend, wooden rod
catalogue.care: Vacuum gently on low setting with a brush attachment. Do not wash.

catalogue.name: Brass Wall Hooks — Set of 3
catalogue.description: Minimalist single-arm brass wall hooks. Suitable for coats, bags, and towels. Wall plugs and screws included.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a soft cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners. Polish with brass cloth if needed.

catalogue.name: Round Mirror — Rattan Frame
catalogue.description: Circular mirror with a hand-wrapped natural rattan frame. Adds warmth and a sense of space to any room.
catalogue.care: Clean mirror glass with glass cleaner. Dust rattan with a dry brush.

catalogue.name: Pressed Flower Frame — Meadow Collection
catalogue.description: Professionally pressed and mounted meadow wildflowers in a deep-set oak shadow box frame. Ready to hang.
catalogue.materials: Pressed botanicals, oak shadow box frame
catalogue.care: Avoid direct sunlight to prevent fading. Dust frame with a soft cloth.

catalogue.name: Minimalist Wall Clock — Concrete
catalogue.description: Slim concrete-finish wall clock with brushed brass hands. Quiet sweep mechanism — no ticking. AA battery.
catalogue.care: Dust with a dry cloth. Do not expose to moisture. Replace battery annually.

catalogue.name: Gallery Wall Kit — 9 Frames
catalogue.description: Nine frames in assorted sizes (A5, A4, A3) for a curated gallery wall. Mix of portrait and landscape orientations. Includes positioning template.
catalogue.care: Wipe with dry cloth. Position on wall using the included paper template for perfect spacing.

catalogue.name: Neon Sign — Warm White Script
catalogue.description: LED neon flex sign in a warm white 'Home' script. Low energy, cool to touch. 2m cable with UK plug. Indoor use only.
catalogue.materials: LED neon flex on acrylic backing
catalogue.care: Dust with a dry cloth. Do not bend sharply. Keep away from water.

catalogue.name: Jute Area Rug — Natural (Large)
catalogue.description: Chunky hand-woven jute rug. A durable, sustainable floor covering that adds natural texture to living rooms and hallways.
catalogue.care: Vacuum regularly without beater bar. Spot clean with mild detergent. Avoid moisture and direct sunlight.

catalogue.name: Moroccan Berber Rug — Cream
catalogue.description: Authentic Moroccan Berber rug hand-knotted by artisans in the Atlas Mountains. Lozenge pattern in traditional cream and black.
catalogue.care: Professional clean recommended. Vacuum regularly without beater bar. Rotate annually for even wear.

catalogue.name: Cotton Flatweave Runner — Stripe
catalogue.description: Reversible cotton flatweave runner for hallways, kitchens, and bedside use. Machine washable.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 40°C. Tumble dry low. Non-slip underlay recommended.

catalogue.name: Sheepskin Rug — Single Pelt
catalogue.description: Genuine single sheepskin rug. Luxuriously soft and warm. Perfect beside a bed or in front of a fireplace.
catalogue.care: Shake outdoors to freshen. Spot clean with wool shampoo. Brush pile when dry.

catalogue.name: Velvet Tufted Rug — Blush (Medium)
catalogue.description: Ultra-plush hand-tufted velvet rug with a dense, low pile. A tactile statement piece for bedrooms and living rooms.
catalogue.care: Vacuum regularly without beater bar. Professional clean recommended. Avoid crushing pile.

catalogue.name: Hemp & Cotton Braided Rug — Round
catalogue.description: Hand-braided round rug from recycled hemp and cotton. Ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, and entryways.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 30°C. Tumble dry low. Non-slip mat recommended on hard floors.

catalogue.name: Kilim-Inspired Wool Rug — Geometric
catalogue.description: Flat-woven wool rug with a bold geometric kilim-inspired pattern. Handmade in India. Reversible.
catalogue.care: Vacuum flat side. Spot clean with mild wool detergent. Dry clean for deep cleaning.

catalogue.name: Anti-Fatigue Kitchen Mat
catalogue.description: Ergonomic kitchen mat with a bevelled edge and anti-fatigue foam core. Easy to wipe clean. Non-slip back.
catalogue.care: Wipe with a damp cloth and mild detergent. Do not machine wash.

catalogue.name: Bamboo Bath Mat
catalogue.description: Slatted bamboo bath mat that dries quickly and resists mold. A spa-inspired alternative to fabric bath mats.
catalogue.care: Wipe dry after use. Oil annually with bamboo oil. Do not leave submerged in water.

catalogue.name: Shaggy Bedroom Rug — Ivory (Large)
catalogue.description: Deep-pile shaggy rug for a luxurious underfoot feel in bedrooms. Sink-your-toes-in softness.
catalogue.care: Vacuum regularly with suction only — no beater bar. Brush pile to restore. Spot clean.

catalogue.name: Terracotta Plant Pot — Set of 3
catalogue.description: Classic terracotta pots in three sizes with drainage holes. Frost-resistant for year-round outdoor use.
catalogue.dimensions: Small H 12cm, Medium H 18cm, Large H 24cm
catalogue.care: Water freely — terracotta is breathable and drains well. Protect from standing water in winter.

catalogue.name: Outdoor Lantern — Powder Coated Steel
catalogue.description: Large outdoor lantern for candles or LED candles. Powder-coated finish is weather and rust resistant.
catalogue.care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Remove candles in heavy rain. Store indoors in harsh winter conditions.

catalogue.name: Hanging Egg Chair — Natural Rattan
catalogue.description: Indoor/outdoor hanging egg chair with a cushioned seat and back. Includes ceiling hook and hanging rope. Max load 120kg.
catalogue.materials: Natural rattan frame, cotton canvas cushion
catalogue.care: Cover or store cushion indoors during rain. Treat rattan with outdoor varnish annually.

catalogue.name: Solar Garden String Lights — 5m
catalogue.description: Solar-powered warm white string lights with 20 globe bulbs. No wiring needed. Auto on at dusk, off at dawn.
catalogue.materials: IP65 waterproof LED globes, solar panel
catalogue.care: Ensure solar panel receives 6+ hours of direct sun daily. Store indoors in winter.

catalogue.name: Raised Garden Bed — Cedar Wood
catalogue.description: Flat-pack cedar wood raised bed for growing herbs, vegetables, and flowers. Natural cedar resists rot and insects.
catalogue.care: Apply a natural wood oil annually. No lining needed — cedar is naturally rot-resistant.

catalogue.name: Outdoor Cushion — Stripe (Set of 2)
catalogue.description: Fade-resistant outdoor cushions filled with quick-dry hollowfibre. For garden furniture and sun loungers.
catalogue.care: Machine wash 30°C. Dry outdoors. Store in a waterproof bag over winter.

catalogue.name: Bird Bath — Speckled Ceramic
catalogue.description: Hand-glazed ceramic bird bath on a powder-coated steel stand. Weighted base for stability in wind.
catalogue.materials: Glazed ceramic bowl, powder-coated steel stand
catalogue.care: Empty and refill with fresh water every 2–3 days. Store indoors or cover in hard frost.

catalogue.name: Galvanised Watering Can — 8L
catalogue.description: Classic galvanised steel watering can with a long spout and removable rose head for gentle watering.
catalogue.care: Empty after use to prevent rust. Store in a dry place. Oil moving parts if stiff.

catalogue.name: Outdoor Scented Candle — Citronella & Eucalyptus
catalogue.description: Citronella and eucalyptus candle in a terracotta pot. Naturally deters insects while adding ambience. 30-hour burn.
catalogue.materials: Soy and beeswax blend, essential oils
catalogue.care: Burn in sheltered outdoor areas. Extinguish in wind. Keep away from plants and flammable materials.

catalogue.name: Garden Kneeler & Tool Bag Set
catalogue.description: Foam kneeler that converts to a seat, paired with a canvas tool bag. Includes 3 essential stainless steel tools.
catalogue.materials: High-density foam kneeler, canvas bag, stainless steel tools
catalogue.care: Wipe kneeler clean with damp cloth. Dry tools before storage to prevent rust.
